prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 8971→9621→10656→19755→19482，2024 年因江西新高考改革（文理分科改为物理/历史类）出现位次大幅跳升，2025 年略回稳至 19482 名；近 2 年基准约 19482 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 128 人→2022 年 95 人→2023 年 99 人→2024 年 102 人→2025 年 126 人，呈先降后升；2026 年计划 135 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 7.1%，扩招幅度温和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 53 名，近年排名稳定在 46–58 名区间，属全国中上游水平；2026 年声誉评价偏正面，抖音热度排名第 89、评价为\"一般\"，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录，学校整体形象正面；教育学 A+（全国顶尖）、心理学 A-、马克思主义理论 A- 等，对物理类考生报考师范类、心理学等专业有吸引力；计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业虽非该校 A 类学科，但社会热度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，对物理类考生有较强吸引力；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 474900 人，较 2025 年约 472480 人略有增加，竞争略加剧，较 2024 年 448 分有所下降，反映整体竞争水平略有缓和；华中师范大学位于湖北武汉，与江西相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在江西省物理类招生规模较大，2026 年计划 135 人，显示对江西生源的持续重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024–2025 年位次已大幅后移（因新高考改革）、2026 年小幅扩招（+7.1%）、声誉偏正面、工科专业热度高等因素，扩招带来的竞争缓解效应有限，但声誉正面和工科热度对位次有一定上移支撑；在 ，结合学校层次与专业热度做有限回调，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 20217 名，区间 19717–20717 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 8971→9621→10656→19755→19482. In 2024, due to Jiangxi's new college entrance examination reform (changing from arts/science division to physics/history categories), there was a significant jump in ranking, which slightly stabilized to 19482 in 2025; the recent two-year baseline is about 19482. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 128 in 2021→95 in 2022→99 in 2023→102 in 2024→126 in 2025, showing an initial decrease followed by an increase; the 2026 plan is 135, a modest expansion of about 7.1% compared to 2025, with a moderate expansion rate.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 46–58 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 89 and a rating of "average," indicating moderate short video exposure; no significant enrollment gaps have been recorded, and the overall image of the school is positive; Education is rated A+ (top nationally), Psychology A-, Marxist Theory A-, etc., which are attractive to Physics Category candidates applying for teacher training, psychology, and other majors; computer science, electronic information, and other engineering majors, though not A-level disciplines at this university, have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering are highly recommended due to their social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province for 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase from about 472,480 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition, but a decrease from the 448 score in 2024 reflects a slight easing in overall competition; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Jiangxi, with a strong regional preference; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale for Physics Category in Jiangxi, with 135 planned spots in 2026, showing continued emphasis on Jiangxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings from 2024–2025 (due to the new college entrance examination reform), the modest expansion in 2026 (+7.1%), a somewhat positive reputation, and high popularity of engineering majors, the competitive relief from expansion is limited, but the positive reputation and engineering popularity provide some upward support for rankings; combined with the school level and major popularity for a limited adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 20217, with a range of 19717–20717.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<19717), you can prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Mathematics.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1625→1595→1605→1737→1941, showing a slow backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 336 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1941; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 84 in 2021→56 in 2022→55 in 2023→48 in 2024→46 in 2025, decreasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 66, a significant expansion of about 43.5% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, and competition pressure is expected to ease.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 53rd, with recent rankings stable in the 46–58 range, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to lifelong learning stories such as '81-year-old PhD graduates from Central China Normal University', which have a positive impact on the school's image; Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure is moderate; no obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded; Education A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, with strong teacher training disciplines, which have strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors has shown a differentiated and wait-and-see trend in recent years, overall stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from about 472,480 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score was 486, up from 463 in 2024, reflecting an overall increase in competition level; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Jiangxi, with strong regional preference; the school has a relatively high enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province for History Category, with 46 planned in 2025 and expanding to 66 in 2026, showing emphasis on Jiangxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+43.5%), the relatively positive school reputation, outstanding disciplines, and a slight increase in provincial candidates, the competition relief effect from expansion is the dominant force, but the positive reputation and disciplinary appeal provide some upward support for rankings; combined with the school level and reputation for limited adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2397, with a range of 1966–2828.
